subject: fix(theme): default to dark mode instead of light
body:
App was showing off-white (#F9FAFB) background because light theme was
the default. Flipped all theme resolution logic to use dark mode unless
the system explicitly requests light mode. Updated web body CSS, map
style, and static Theme alias to match.

Tags: ui, theme, dark-mode
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dark-mode
Semver: patch
